Flrn PolIrIcel PRACTICEs CouvtlsSIoN
428 J Street e Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
May 1,2007
Dale Skillicom
Watsonville City Council Member
T29PalmAvenue
Watsonville, California 9 5 07 6
RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-062
Dear Mr. Skillicorn:
This letter is in response to your request for written advice regarding the conflict-
of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").r You have asked several
questions regarding the conduct of a member of the Watsonville City Commission.
Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations Section 18329(bX8)(B), unless
the Commissioner has authorizedyou as his representative, the Fair Political Practices
Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I have enclosed a copy
of Regulation 18329 for your review.
Additionally, we must decline your request for advice since our response would
amotnt to advice on past conduct. (See $ 83114; subd. (b); Regulation 18329, subd.
(bX8XA)&(C) copies enclosed.) Formal written advice is the application of law to a
glven set of facts provided by the requestor and has the effect of conferring immunity to
the requestor. (Section83114; Regulation 18329(b)(7).) Your current question involves
analysis of a series of interrelated decisions, some of which have already occurred, such
that any advice at this time would necessarily relate to past conduct and, therefore, would
not further the impartial, effective administration of the Act so mandated by Section
831 I 1.
Therefore, we cannot consider your request. If you believe a violation of the
Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our
I Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
@


File No. W-07-062
Page No. 2
Enforcement Division. If you have other questions on this matter,please contact me at
(9t6) 322-s660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel
Jqil"fr**
By: Sukhi Brar
Counsel, Legal Division
SBjsl
